title: Roadmap (an epic — a dependency-ordered container of tickets)
description: An epic decomposes a workflow/system-scope goal into a dependency-ordered ticket set placed on the roadmap (roadmap-planner authors it). Stored one file per epic under coordination/roadmap/{epic-id}.json. Like everything else it is git-native substrate; the UI roadmap view is a derived projection.

body.description: The goal this epic delivers and its rationale.

target_cell.description: The workflow/system-scope cell this epic advances (the unifying knowledge target).

tickets.description: Member tickets in dependency order. The order is advisory; the compass re-derives readiness from the actual dependency graph (computation routes to code).

status.description: Epic-level rollup; materialized from its tickets' states (a fold, not a hand-set value).
